ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the review was published */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the platform on which the game is available */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "language" INTEGER /* Language of the review */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score given in the review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who submitted the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "spoiler" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the review contains spoilers */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the review has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the review has received */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_language FOREIGN KEY ("language") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the review site */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the review site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for integrating with the site */,
  "last_synced" TEXT /* Date and time when the site was last synced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the gaming platform (e.g., Steam, Nintendo Switch) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the platform's icon */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the platform is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the game */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer of the game */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the game */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Age rating of the game */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the game */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the game's cover image */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the game's trailer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language (e.g., English, Spanish) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the language is primarily used */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review being scored */,
  "normalized_score" REAL /* Normalized score value for analysis */,
  "max_score" INTEGER /* Maximum possible score for reference */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment analysis score of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_scores_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the comment is flagged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_comments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., Indie, RPG) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_tags" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag associated with the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Developer, Reviewer, Admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON or text field for role permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
